description_long: This triumphal arch features a grand central archway flanked by two smaller arches, all set within a rectangular structure with a pitched roof. The facade is adorned with decorative elements, including circular windows and ornate reliefs above the smaller arches. The exterior is primarily a warm terracotta color with white accent panels and golden-yellow decorative domes above the side arches. The structure has open passageways on both the front and back, allowing for traversal through the central arch. The side walls are simpler, with a few windows and less ornamentation. The overall design suggests a blend of classical and eclectic architectural influences, making it a striking monument in an urban setting.
description: A grand triumphal arch with a central passage, ornate reliefs, and a terracotta and white facade with golden domes.
description_view_0: Front view showing three arches, ornate reliefs, circular windows, and golden domes above the side arches.
description_view_1: Side view with fewer decorative elements, showing windows and the open central passage.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front but with less ornamentation and only one small window on each side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1 with windows and the open central passage.
